T0146.title: Boxed-Meal Scam
T0146.definition: A scam where fraudsters use fake bulk orders to trick victims into paying upfront costs or deposits. Scammers often impersonate authority figures or influential entities, fabricating urgent orders and high-profit margins to pressure victims into paying without proper verification. Typically, the scammer demands a large, urgent order for a specific branded product the victim cannot supply, then directs them to a fraudulent supplier or purchase link, ultimately stealing the payment.

T0146.usageExample: 昨天有个饭店老板接到个部队的盒饭大单，垫了八万块买指定罐头，结果对方和供应商一起消失了。
